title: Pavitra Rishta
subTitle: Manav, a humble mechanic, is deeply in love with Archana, a hardworking middle-class girl. They marry, but their happiness is soon overshadowed by a series of crises within their family.

subTitle: Madhu informs Pushpa that she is inviting her friends to have lunch with them; Poulomi Devi creates problems in the kitchen for Santoshi to stop her from cooking food.

subTitle: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her.

subTitle: Inspired by stories from their childhood, two young men create a business around capturing ghosts. However, their endeavour turns dangerous when they must fulfil their promise to a poltergeist.

title: Satyaprem Ki Katha
subTitle: Satyaprem tries hard to prove himself as a worthy person and restore the faith in the love of Khata, who is overwhelmed by her breakup.

subTitle: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.
